programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim's band wins a contest, providing the group an opportunity to play backup for child pop sensation Jami McFame.

programme.title: Death on the Nile
programme.desc: Belgian sleuth Hercule Poirot's Egyptian vacation aboard a glamorous river steamer turns into a terrifying search for a murderer when a picture-perfect couple's idyllic honeymoon is tragically cut short.

programme.title: The Transporter
programme.desc: Ex-Special Forces operator Frank Martin (Jason Statham) lives what seems to be a quiet life along the French Mediterranean, hiring himself out as a mercenary transporter who moves goods - human or otherwise - from one place to another. No questions asked. Dangerous complications ensue when he is hired to kidnap the feisty daughter of a lethal Chinese crime lord who's smuggling his fellow countrymen into France.

programme.title: Transporter 2
programme.desc: Mercenary Frank Martin (Jason Statham) has accepted a job that seems easy enough, as chauffeur and bodyguard to young Jack (Hunter Clary), son of crusading politician Jefferson Billings (Matthew Modine). The problem is that Billings is crusading against an international drug cartel. They retaliate by kidnapping Jack and infecting him with a deadly and highly contagious virus. Responsible for the boy, Frank must reclaim him and then find an antidote before scores of innocents are stricken.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: It's been 10 years since Jason Bourne (Matt Damon) walked away from the agency that trained him to become a deadly weapon. Hoping to draw him out of the shadows, CIA director Robert Dewey assigns hacker and counterinsurgency expert Heather Lee to find him. Lee suspects that former operative Nicky Parsons is also looking for him. As she begins tracking the duo, Bourne finds himself back in action battling a sinister network that utilizes terror and technology to maintain unchecked power.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: Obsessively punctual FedEx executive Chuck Noland (Tom Hanks) is en route to an assignment in Malaysia when his plane crashes over the Pacific Ocean during a storm. The sole survivor of the flight, Chuck washes ashore on a deserted island. When his efforts to sail away and contact help fail, Chuck learns how to survive on the island, where he remains for years, accompanied by only his handmade volleyball friend, Wilson. Will Chuck ever return to civilization and reunite with his loved ones?

programme.title: The Martian
programme.desc: When astronauts blast off from the planet Mars, they leave behind Mark Watney, presumed dead after a fierce storm. With only a meager amount of supplies, the stranded visitor must utilize his wits and spirit to find a way to survive on the hostile planet. Meanwhile, back on Earth, members of NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home, while his crew mates hatch their own plan for a daring rescue mission.

programme.title: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story
programme.desc: Average Joe's Gym and its owner, Peter La Fleur (Vince Vaughn), are both down on their luck. A fancy competing gym called Globo-Gym, run by the maniacal health nut White Goodman (Ben Stiller), is about to put Average Joe's out of business unless Peter can raise $50,000 to keep his mortgage. To save the gym, Peter and a ragtag group of Average Joe's members and employees enter a dodgeball contest with a big cash prize. In response, White forms his own Globo-Gym team to rout the competition.

programme.desc: The final visit is to The Royal Oak Inn in Somerset, run by Spencer and Gavin. After talking a good game all week, the guests are shocked to find the standards to be rather... standard.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On payment day, the guests rifle through their feedback, from troubles over a breakfast hamper to dodgy décor decisions. But at the end of it all, which B&B will reign supreme.

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: In Gloucestershire, George teams Simon and Lisa up with a creative architect to come up with a scheme to turn their terrifying house into a modern home.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: We catch up with Becky and Adam in Essex, whose dreamy doer-upper has changed a lot since 2019, and Kinga and Dave, who loved and lost out in Leeds before finding the one in 2021.

programme.title: PopMaster TV

programme.title: Bill Bailey's Vietnam

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Thoughtifier
programme.desc: From polar bear raves to AI sea shanties and the collapse of the teaspoon industry, Bill leads a magical, musical mystery tour of the human mind in his 2025 stand-up at Edinburgh Playhouse.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: It's a busy day for new consultant Sobi, with 15-year-old Gus going over the handlebars of his bike and Patricia, who's 73, in extreme pain due to a dislocated shoulder.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
